class ListNode:
    def __init__(self, val=0, next=None):
        self.val = val
        self.next = next

def reverseKGroup(head: ListNode, k: int) -> ListNode:
    def reverseList(head, tail):
        prev = tail.next
        curr = head
        while prev != tail:
            nxt = curr.next
            curr.next = prev
            prev = curr
            curr = nxt
        return tail, head

    dummy = ListNode(0)
    dummy.next = head
    pre = dummy

    while True:
        tail = pre
        for _ in range(k):
            tail = tail.next
            if not tail:
                return dummy.next
        
        head = pre.next
        nxt = tail.next
        head, tail = reverseList(head, tail)
        pre.next = head
        tail.next = nxt
        pre = tail
